svg.style: display: block; margin: 0; padding: 0; background: #0f2027; min-height: 100vh;
svg.title: Framework Bio-Token V3.0: Parliament of All Things
svg.desc: Phase 2 Evolution - Multi-Modal Ecological Intelligence integrating eDNA, Fungi Networks, and AI Agency following Actor-Network Theory

text.style: fill: #f0f9ff; font-family: 'Futura', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; text-anchor: middle;
fill: #f0f9ff; font-family: 'Futura', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; text-anchor: middle;
fill: #f0f9ff; font-family: 'Futura', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: bold; text-anchor: middle;

xhtml:div.style: margin: 10px 0; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(173, 232, 244, 0.1); border: 1px solid #ade8f4; font-size: 5px;

margin: 10px 0; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(86, 207, 225, 0.1); border: 1px solid #56cfe1; font-size: 5px;
margin: 10px 0; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(32, 178, 170, 0.1); border: 1px solid #20b2aa; font-size: 5px;
font-size: 4px !important; color: #8ecae6; line-height: 0.9; margin-top: 5px; transform: scale(0.8);

xhtml:div.xhtml:div:
Actor-Network Theory Implementation:
• AI, eDNA, and Fungi as equal democratic agents
• Multi-temporal synchronization protocols
• Chemical, genetic, and algorithmic translation
• Posthuman environmental governance
• Soleiman López artistic framework integration
• First Parliament of All Things prototype

text.style: fill: #e0f2fe; font-family: 'Futura', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; text-anchor: middle;

g.text: PARLIAMENT OF ALL THINGS - THEORETICAL FRAMEWORK
Actor-Network Theory (Bruno Latour) • Human/Non-Human Symmetry • Multi-Species Democracy
eDNA Genetic Validation • Mycorrhizal Chemical Networks • AI Algorithmic Consciousness
Inspired by Soleiman López - Festival de la Imagen 2025 • Colombian Biodiversity Governance

text.style: fill: #f0f9ff; font-family: 'Futura', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; text-anchor: middle;

g.text: 21 Active Agents • 3 Agent Types • Multi-Temporal Governance
eDNA: 8 Sites • Fungi: 4 Networks • AI: Meta-Governance Core
